home.title: Image Format Converter
home.subtitle: Convert images to JPG, WebP, or PNG. 100% free and secure. All conversion happens locally—your files never leave your device.
home.convertToJpg: Convert any image format to JPG. Perfect for photos and web use.
home.convertToWebp: Convert images to WebP for smaller file sizes and faster loading.
home.convertToPng: Convert images to PNG for lossless quality and transparency support.

converter.title: Image to {format} Converter
converter.description: 100% free. Convert images to {format} locally—no uploads, no signup. Your files never leave your device.
converter.localConversionDesc: Conversion runs on your device only. Files never leave your computer—no uploads, no servers.
converter.superFastDesc: Each file costs about 1 second for conversion. Batch process hundreds of images at once.
converter.fullyFunctionalDesc: Handles all jobs involved with image to {format} conversion. From any format to {format}.

benefits.title: Why Choose Our Image Converter?
benefits.subtitle: Powerful features that make image conversion simple and secure

local.title: 100% Local Conversion
local.description: All image conversion happens entirely on your device. Your files never leave your computer—no uploads to servers, no data collection, complete privacy and security.

fast.title: Lightning Fast Processing
fast.description: Convert images in seconds, not minutes. Our optimized conversion engine processes each file in about 1 second, and you can batch process hundreds of images simultaneously.

free.title: 100% Free Forever
free.description: No hidden fees, no subscriptions, no watermarks. Use our image converter as much as you want, whenever you need it. Completely free with no strings attached.

batch.title: Batch Processing Power
batch.description: Convert multiple images at once with our powerful batch processing feature. Upload hundreds of images and convert them all in one go, saving you hours of manual work.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our image converter
